creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192693
Patch updating lang/retro12 to 2018.4.20

It's an update to the RETRO12 language.

Changes:
  - The Makefile was simplified because I've worked with the upstream developer to integrate some improvements into the release.
  - CONFLICTS_INSTALL were added.
  - Patches were removed as they are no longer needed.

Release notes:
  - http://forthworks.com:8000/artifact/9bd7d3eda271788f 

QA:
  - portlint -AC
  - poudriere testport: 10.4 and 11.1 on amd64 and i386
  - builds fine on 12.0-CURRENT r332397
